title: My husband died suddenly - what now?
description: GEORGE NEWS - It's happened to one of...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - It's happened to one of their friends, and they want to make sure others will be more prepared.

Pieter Nortje and his wife Linda of Adviceworx realised there is a huge need for guidance for women that lay down the steps one can take when your husband passes unexpectedly.

"Our friend was devastated and had absolutely no idea what to do next," said Nortje. "We realised this is something we can help with.


> There are certain things you have to have in place, and some other things that people have learned over the years through trial and error. We can make this easier with clear-cut guidance."


This topic will be discussed at the George Arts Theatre on Tuesday 16 July from 09:00 to 11:00.

Entry is free of charge.

Limited space is available, so please RSVP before 11 July to Linda on 082 926 8772 or send an email to [email protected].

Need some help with a to-do-list for when the unimaginable happens? Photo: Pexels

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
